briefs.title: Council to Consider: Declaring April 28th Official Day of Mourning for Workers
briefs.summary: Council will consider a request from the New Westminster & District Labour Council to officially declare April 28th as the 'Day of Mourning for Workers Killed and Injured on the Job,' observe a minute of silence in chambers, and hear a 5-minute presentation on workplace safety and WorkSafeBC updates.
briefs.action_required: Note April 28th — consider observing a minute of silence with your staff at 11:00 a.m.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council delegation presentation — workplace safety and Day of Mourning
Day of Mourning for Workers — minute of silence at 11:00 a.m.

briefs.industries: Labour & Employment, Construction & Development, Professional Services
